summary: No new verifiable AI displacement events found within the past 24-48 hours. Recent major events (Oracle 30,000 cuts on March 31, Snap 1,000 cuts on April 15) fall outside the specified timeframe. The search reveals continued discussion of previously reported layoffs but no fresh displacement announcements for April 25-26, 2026.

all_events.headline: Meta announces 8,000 job cuts effective May 20 as part of AI efficiency push
all_events.excerpt: Meta announced on April 26 that it will cut approximately 8,000 jobs—roughly 10% of its workforce—starting May 20, 2026.

all_events.headline: Nike announces 1,400 job cuts concentrated in technology department
all_events.excerpt: Nike announced a new round of layoffs Thursday affecting approximately 1,400 employees across the company, mostly concentrated in its technology department.

all_events.headline: Microsoft offers voluntary buyouts to 7% of staff amid AI restructuring
all_events.excerpt: Microsoft said Thursday it would offer buyouts to 7% of staff.
